title: Daily Signal Brief 002 — AWS enters AI interviewing; Freshworks ships MCP Gateway
summary: Refreshed at 13:43Z to add two material signals the 13:22Z pass missed in the same 24h window. NEW L3: AWS launched Amazon Connect Talent (preview) — agentic AI conducting interviews, scoring answers, dashboarding for recruiter action; first hyperscaler entrant in the AI-interviewing market; AEDT applicability is the open question. NEW L2: Freshworks unveiled Freddy AI Agent Studio and an MCP Gateway on 2026-05-14 with explicit Workday/Rippling HRIS workflow targeting (onboarding, payroll) — a new 'agentic gateway in front of HRIS' pattern. The three-ATS MCP pattern from earlier today still stands. Recommended actions assigned to Kernel (AWS Connect Talent claim-vs-fact read), Forge (architecture + gateway interop), Compass (battlecard slot for AWS, gateway answer in buyer Q&A), Tessera (Lattice right-rail pattern decision). Closing notes a calibration miss: the earlier pass anchored on the MCP narrative and didn't look broadly enough at big-tech entrants and adjacent vendors.
